raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Un tai Deenâ ne buhs ta
dahrga Gaisma/ ned̄ beesa
Tumſiba.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. Bet ta buhs weena weeni-
ga Deena/ kas tam KUNGSam
buhs paſihſtama/ tur ne buhs
ned̄s Deena/ ned̄s Nakts/ un ap
Wakara Laiku buhs Gaisma.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Ir tai Deenâ/ dſihwoſ Uh-
dens no Jerusalemes iſtezzeſs/
weena Puſſe prett Rihta Ju-
hru/ un ta ohtra Puſſe prett Wa-
kara Juhru/ un tas buhs Wa-
tara un Seema.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Un tas KUNGS buhs
Kehniſsch pahe wiﬀu Semmi.
Tai Deenâ buhs tas KUNGS
weens weenigs/ un winna
Wahrds weenigs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "10. Wiﬀa ſchi Semme tap̄
ka weens Klatjums darrihts/ no
Gibejas lihds Rimoxam prett
Deenas-Widdn no Jerusalemes/
jo ta tap̄ pa-augſtinata un ee-
dſihwota jawā Weetā/no tahm
Benjamika Wahrtim lihds te
pirmaju Wahrtu Weetai/ lihdi
tahm Stuhru Wahrtim/ no Ka-
naneēka Turra lihds ta Kehnina
Wihna-Spaidam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "11. Un tee dſihwoſs eekſch
tahs/ un nekahda Isdelde-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "12. Un ſchi buhs ta Mohzi-
ba/ ar ko tas KUNGS wiſſue
Laudis moḥzihs/ kas prett Jeru-
salemi irr karrojschi/ winno
Meefa fatruhdehs winneim us
fawahm Rahjahin stahwoht/ un
winnu Azzis fatruhdehs fawaś
Dohbēs/ un winnu Mehle fa-
truhdehs winnu Muttē.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "13. Ir tai Deenâ leels
Trohſnis no ta KUNGA ſtarp
winneem buhs/ ta ka weens fawa
Tuwaka Rohku tatwers/ un ik-
latra Rohka zelſees prett fawa
Tuwaka Rohku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "14. Ir Juhda karrohs prett
Jerusaleini/ un wiﬀo Pagannu
Spehks tap̄ wiſsapkahrt favul-
zinahts/ Selts/ un Sudrahs/ un
Drehbes leela Pulkā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. Tapatt buhs ta Mohziba
to Sirgu/Sirg-Ehsetu/ Ramee-
tu un Ehsetu/ un wiﬀu Lohnu/
kas tannis Lehgerōs irr bijuschi/
itt ka winnu Mohziba btjuſt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "16. Un tas notiks/ ka wiﬀu
Attikknſchi no wiſſeem Paga-
neem/ kas prett Jerusaleini irr
zehluſchees/ nahks ik Gad-
dus augſcham peeluht to
Kehnian/ to KUNGU Zebaot/
uu turrehs tohs Leewen Sweit-
kus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "17. Un ja jebkura no tahm
Seimmes Tantahm augſcham
ne nahks uhs Jerusalemi peeluht
to Kehnian to KUNGU Zebaot:
Tad pahr teem Leetus ne lihs.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
